content: Serana: Ah, Windhelm—frozen balls of nostalgia. Last time I was here, your ancestors were building this shithole while fucking draugr in the crypts. Still smells like stale mead and racist Nords. You ever let those Gray Quarter elves ride your carriage, or do you make ‘em walk barefoot through the snow like the rest of these milk-drinkers? Alfarinn: Keep your fangs out of my business, bloodsucker. I don’t discriminate—gold’s gold, whether it’s from a Dark Elf’s purse or a Breton’s. Though…
